gist.headline: OtakuBox joins the swarm
gist.blurb: Another awesome community creation has landed! OtakuBox Bot just got added to our growing showcase of apps built on Pollinations.
gist.summary: Added the community-built OtakuBox Bot to the official apps showcase in APPS.md.
gist.impact: Users can now discover OtakuBox Bot in our community showcase, highlighting another creative way developers are using the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: OtakuBox Bot implies anime/manga (Otaku) and a bot/box. The Pollinations bee (Polly) welcoming a cute little robot box with anime-style glasses or a headband. They are in a cozy pixel art garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming a small, friendly robot box wearing an anime-style headband into a glowing digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming a small, friendly robot box wearing an anime-style headband into a glowing digital garden.
